decisions.question: Split broker runtime by responsibility
decisions.reasoning: Kept the CLI-facing runtime API stable while moving cohesive concerns into runtime submodules: init loop, session setup, pending delivery, headless worker, connection discovery, paths, terminal/system helpers, message/thread helpers, frame IO, and spawn spec parsing.

decisions.question: Split broker binary entrypoint mechanically
decisions.reasoning: Kept behavior stable by moving clap parsing to crates/broker/src/cli/mod.rs and the existing broker runtime/test code to crates/broker/src/runtime.rs, then updated sibling modules to import moved helpers explicitly.

decisions.question: Apply issue 875 to crates/broker/src/main.rs
decisions.reasoning: The broker binary was moved under crates/broker after the issue text was written, so the current main.rs entrypoint now lives there.

decisions.question: Removed repository-root bin fallback
decisions.reasoning: The root bin directory only contained .gitkeep, production broker binaries resolve through optional packages, and local development resolves through Cargo target or SDK bin paths.
